content.scenarioHint: 用户在图书馆借了书，想确认是否可以续借以及如何操作，向工作人员提问。
content.speakerText: Can I renew my books, and how do I do it?
content.speakerTextCn: 我可以续借我的书吗？怎么操作？
expectedAnswers: Yes, you can renew online through the library app or website. Just sign in and select 'Renew'.
Sure! You can renew in person at the front desk, or by calling us with your library card number.
You're eligible for one renewal if no one else has requested the book. Check your account online.
Absolutely — you can renew up to two times, as long as there are no holds on the items.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确询问了是否可以续借以及如何操作
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了相关关键词如 'renew', 'online', 'library account'
表达自然度：符合日常口语习惯，语气礼貌自然
关键词覆盖：包含 'renew', 'how', 'online/in person/calling' 等场景核心词

content.speakerText: I'm not sure if my book can be renewed. How can I check?
content.speakerTextCn: 我不确定我的书能不能续借，该怎么查？
expectedAnswers: Log in to your library account online — it will show you which books are eligible for renewal.
Check the due date on the app or website; if it says 'Renewable', you can do it.
Go to the library’s website, view your checked-out items, and look for a 'Renew' button next to each book.
evaluationCriteria: 是否提供了清晰的查询方法（登录账户、查看状态、查找按钮）
是否使用了场景相关词汇（renewable, due date, checked-out items）
回答是否结构完整、逻辑清晰，便于用户执行
